title: vm-start
description: Receipt for `testanyware vm start`. Identifies the started VM and its endpoints.

dry_run.description: Present and true when --dry-run was set.

id.description: VM instance id. Defaults to testanyware-<hex8>; a caller-supplied --id may use any value.

base.description: Golden image cloned for this VM.

agent.description: Agent endpoint, or null if the agent did not reach health within the boot window.
